description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the library/rust:latest Docker image and a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq and installs libgtk-3-dev without recommended packages. Define a single job named test:cargo (which runs in the default test stage) that executes rustc --version && cargo --version and then runs cargo test --verbose --jobs 1 --release. No services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
